headline: NetApp Nutanix Alliance Links Hybrid Cloud Push With Undervalued Shares
summary: NetApp and Nutanix have formed an alliance to connect NetApp’s Intelligent Data Infrastructure with the Nutanix Cloud Platform. The collaboration focuses on virtualization, hybrid and multicloud operations, and cyber resilience for enterprise workloads. The companies plan further integration with Nutanix’s Agentic AI stack to support AI driven applications and data services. NetApp, traded as NasdaqGS:NTAP, enters this partnership with a share price of $99.47 and a 3 year return of 59.4%...
